rulings.Case Title: DENIS FRANCIS et al VS. FIRST-CITIZENS BANK & TRUST COMPANY, et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 25, 2013, line 4. Order To Show Cause Plaintiff's Motion for Preliminary Injunction is DENIED. Plaintiff failed to show likelihood of prevailing on the merits. Plaintiff failed to show that Defendant is acting in bad faith it attempting to foreclose on 26th Avenue property. Plaintiff failed to provide evidence to show that sale of Sloat property will yield sufficient amounts to cover both loans after tax lien is paid off. Judicially noticeable documents establish the amounts in default and contractual interest rates. Even Plaintiff's new evidence suggests that sale proceeds (available at undetermined time) will not cover the total amount owed plus taxes. See Mcenery Declaration 6. = (501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: JIAN CAI MAO et al VS. CHUN YUAN LIN et al

DEFENDANT RICHENG LIN and ZAI XIAO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to clarify, in good faith, the discrepancy between complaint alleging breach of commercial tenancy only and "3 Day Notice" alleging "just cause" for eviction under Rent Ordinance pertaining to residential tenancies. = (501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED VS. JAMIE CROSBY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 25, 2013, line 7. PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT DENIED as follows: "Trial is continued to May 6, 2013; "Defendant shall post $111.02 with the Court no later than April 25, 2013 4:00 p.m.; "Discovery is re-opened for the limited purpose for Plaintiff to propound discovery or notice deposition no later than April 22, 2013 limited to issues raised by amended answer and Defendant to respond to discovery and complete deposition no later than April 25, 2013 by noon. = (501/EHG)
